_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Col2.3Cre mice had an ∼10% reduction in tibial BMD...an even greater reduction of 22% in BMD was observed in tibiae of Col2.3Cre mice
details: Had 10% reduction in tibial BMD at 8 weeks and 22% reduction at 24 weeks compared to WT mice
